role: Brigadier General; Armed Forces Planning and Operations (d. 2 March 2026)
bio: Bahram Hosseini Motlagh served as a Brigadier General in Armed Forces Planning and Operations. He was killed on 2 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave), in the same strike that also killed [Hassan-Ali Tajik](/people/hassan-ali-tajik) and [Mohsen Darrebaghi](/people/mohsen-darrebaghi).

sources.title: Senior Armed Forces Officers Killed in March 2 Strike

editorial_notes: Killed 2 March 2026. Brigadier General, Armed Forces Planning and Operations.
